svg.text: ECO-SIM: Cupim × Fungo-termitomyces - Nutrient and Swarming Clock
Fungiculture · Seasonal Swarming · Rainfall-Triggered Fungal Bloom

g.text: Nasutitermes are the Cerrado's chief decomposers.
Dry Season: Peak foraging; termites build combs
inside the mound; fungus yields protein nodules.
Wet Season (Oct-Nov): First heavy rains provoke
synchronized Revoada of winged alate termites.
Simultaneously, the fungus fruits large mushrooms.
